message:
test(http): add standalone obs-text (RFC 9110) header value parsing test

Adds a minimal test binary that exercises the HTTP/1 codec's handling
of obs-text octets (specifically 0xFF) in header values. RFC 9110
Section 5.5 permits obs-text (0x80-0xFF) in field values for backwards
compatibility, and this test verifies that the codec either accepts
these octets or rejects them with a clear error rather than panicking
or silently corrupting the parsed headers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
